title: Immersive Aircraft: Glass wings
description: Clears your view of those large wooden parts when gunning down your targets. (or whatever you want to do really)
body:
# Glass Wings
The biplanes (and bamboo hoppers) have a problem.
you can't see down through them.
And I have experienced this firsthand when trying too shoot thing with weapons like the rotary cannon.

### BUT NOT ANYMORE!
With this simple pack, you will now be able to see through the wings of your most menuverable aircraft with ease!
Enjow being able to hit your targets!
And be sure to see the galery for images.

If you enjoy what I do, consider supporting me on Ko-fi! Every little bit means a lot https://ko-fi.com/limeimortal

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
